description: issue #210: `set_shape "not-a-shape"` - a word that names no recognized shape also raises `ol-type`, but with `expected: "shape"` instead of `expected: "word"`, since `spec/commands.md`'s `set_shape` entry specifies no dedicated code and the shape set is open/implementation-defined (unlike `set_color`'s closed palette) - a diagnostic identity distinct from the non-word case.

diagnostics.message: i don't know the shape "not-a-shape". try a shape like "turtle", "triangle", "arrow", or "circle".
